dataset.name: Neerslag

reports.name: Neerslag uurwaarden
reports.query:
SELECT
    stationsCode,
    station,
    jaar,
    maand,
    decade,
    dag,
    uur,
    datum_tijd,
    rh,
    dr
FROM v_knmidata_rain_hourly
WHERE 1=1<#SELECTIONS>
ORDER BY datum_tijd

reports.name: Neerslag dagwaarden
reports.query:
SELECT
    stationsCode,
    station,
    jaar,
    maand,
    datum,
    rh,
    rh_norm
FROM v_knmidata_rain_daily
WHERE 1=1<#SELECTIONS>
ORDER BY datum

reports.name: Neerslag maandwaarden
reports.query:
SELECT
    stationsCode,
    station,
    jaar,
    maand,
    maandnummer,
    rh,
    rh_norm
FROM v_knmidata_rain_monthly
WHERE 1=1<#SELECTIONS>
ORDER BY maandnummer

reports.name: Neerslag decadewaarden
reports.query:
SELECT
    stationsCode,
    station,
    jaar,
    maand,
    decade,
    rh,
    rh_norm
FROM v_knmidata_rain_decade
WHERE 1=1<#SELECTIONS>
ORDER BY jaar, maand, decade

reports.name: Neerslag seizoenswaarden
reports.query:
SELECT
    stationsCode,
    station,
    jaar,
    seizoen,
    rh,
    rh_norm
FROM v_knmidata_rain_seizoen
WHERE 1=1<#SELECTIONS>
ORDER BY jaar, FIELD(seizoen, 'W', 'L', 'Z', 'H')

reports.name: Neerslag jaarwaarden
reports.query:
SELECT
    stationsCode,
    station,
    jaar,
    rh,
    rh_norm
FROM v_knmidata_rain_yearly
WHERE 1=1<#SELECTIONS>
ORDER BY jaar
